title: Board of Trustees - DKU
description: The Board of Trustees is Duke Kunshan University’s highest authority. The board is responsible for advancing the mission of, and providing strategic direction to, Duke Kunshan; and approval of all policies and procedures.
text:
Board of Trustees
The Board of Trustees is Duke Kunshan University’s highest authority. It is vested with the power to govern and set policies at the university in accordance with the laws and regulations of the People’s Republic of China and the university’s Articles of Association (AOA) and Cooperative Education Agreement (CEA).
The board oversees strategic planning, maintains fiduciary duties and is responsible for ensuring the university’s operations are consistent with Chinese laws and regulations, the AOA and the CEA.
In addition, the board is responsible for advancing the mission of, and providing strategic direction to, Duke Kunshan; oversight of financial resources and other assets; selection and regular evaluation of the chancellor and executive vice chancellor; and approval of all policies and procedures.
Members:
Alec D. Gallimore (chair)Provost, Duke University
Yufeng Yuan (vice chair)Vice President, Wuhan University
Jianqing Fan (vice chair)Deputy Secretary, CPC Kunshan Municipal CommitteeMayor, Kunshan Municipal People’s Government
Thomas M. GorrieT.M. Gorrie & Associates
Mary Frances LuceDean and Robert A. Ingram Professor of Business Administration, Fuqua School of Business, Duke University
Zhen YuDean of the Undergraduate College and Dean of the Hongyi Honors College, Wuhan University
Yue ZhaoDirector, Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center, Kunshan Municipal People’s Government
Yaolin Liu (ex-officio)Chancellor, Duke Kunshan University
John Quelch (ex-officio)Executive Vice Chancellor, American President, and Distinguished Professor of Social Science, Duke Kunshan UniversityJohn deButts Professor of Practice, Fuqua School of Business, Duke University
Julie Barker (ex-officio; board secretary)Chief of Staff to the Provost, Duke University
Hexiang Deng (ex-officio)Director, Office of International Affairs, Wuhan University
Floyd Beckford (ex-officio)Chair of the Faculty Assembly, Duke Kunshan UniversityProfessor of Chemistry, Duke Kunshan University
